name: Franchise Connect - Custom Product Attributes
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find"}, {"text": " "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/127-franchise-connect-custom-product-attributes#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Product Attributes can be managed from both from the Franchise Connect level and the Franchisee, useful for storing additional product information for reporting and searching e.g. product materials."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Attributes are limited to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "4 x Global Custom Attributes (synchronised from Franchise Connect to Franchisee members)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "4 x Franchisee Custom Attributes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This allows for a total of 8 Custom Attributes, on top of the standard default Attributes included with Retail Express (Size, Colour, Brand, Season)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Attributes are available to filter and display in various reports and features within the system, including "}, {"text": "Product Search and Management"}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Mass Download"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Related:", "bold": true}, {"text": "Settings - Product Attributes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a new member is added to Franchise Connect they will be limited to 4 x Custom Attributes, with the remaining 4 reserved for Global Custom Attributes from Franchise Connect."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Any member with more than 4 x Custom Attributes will need to delete any extras before they can be added to Franchise Connect."}, {"text": "If a member is removed from Franchise Connect, they will be able to edit/delete any Global Attributes (as a normal Custom Attribute) and utilise the full 8 x Custom Attributes once again"}, {"text": "Member Custom Attributes will not sync to Franchise Connect for reporting"}, {"text": "Global Custom Attribute Values being used on Products are synced for reporting purposes"}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Synchronising Custom Attributes"}], "data-id": "synchronising-custom-attributes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Attributes and their associated Attribute Values can be synced to members alone, without syncing products. However, Custom Attributes Values will be synced automatically when syncing products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Considerations:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "All custom "}, {"text": "Attributes and Values will sync every time", "bold": true}, {"text": " (i.e., you cannot limit the sync to only some/selected Attributes or updated Values)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Attributes will be "}, {"text": "matched on name", "bold": true}, {"text": ". If there is an existing Custom Attribute in a member version of Back Office with the same name as an Franchise Connect Custom Attribute - the existing Custom Attribute will be converted to a Global Attribute, thereby freeing up another Custom Attribute for that member."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "New Attribute Values will match by name", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and will be created if they don?t already exist."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Deleted/Edited Attribute Values will "}, {"text": "not remove the old values from the member databases", "bold": true}, {"text": " (as they may be in use for non-global products)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Global Attribute Values will be overridden with attributes every time", "bold": true}, {"text": " with no option not to override (as is provided for the standard attributes)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For information on creating attributes, please refer to the "}, {"text": "Settings - Product Attributes"}, {"text": " article."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Settings - Product Attributes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Franchise Connect - Getting Started"}]}]}]}]
